name: cbore_hole
description: Create a box with a counterbored hole (wider at top, narrower through)

name: csk_hole
description: Create a box with a countersunk hole (conical recess at top)

name: grid_holes
description: Create a plate with a rectangular grid array of holes

name: polar_holes
description: Create a circular plate with holes arranged in a polar/circular pattern

name: washer
description: Create a washer using cq_warehouse fastener library

name: bolt
description: Create a hex head bolt or screw using cq_warehouse

name: nut
description: Create a hex nut using cq_warehouse fastener library

name: helix
description: Create a helical coil by sweeping a circular cross-section along a helix path

name: multi_section_sweep
description: Loft through multiple cross-section profiles (e.g. circle at base, square at top)

name: constrained_assembly
description: Build a multi-part assembly with named parts and geometric constraints solved automatically

name: import_step
description: Import an existing STEP file into CadQuery and optionally translate it

name: export_step
description: Create a solid and export it to STEP, STL, or SVG file format

name: bolt_nut_assembly
description: Create an assembly of a hex bolt and matching hex nut using cq_warehouse

name: flange_bolt_pattern
description: Create a circular flange plate with a polar pattern of bolt holes

name: plate_with_bolts
description: Create a rectangular plate with corner mounting holes sized for bolts

name: bracket
description: L-shaped or T-shaped mounting bracket with optional gusset and mounting holes

name: enclosure
description: Hollow rectangular enclosure box with optional mounting bosses, lid slots and vent holes

name: pocket
description: Plate with rectangular or circular blind pocket (cavity) and optional mounting holes

name: stepped_shaft
description: Stepped cylindrical shaft with multiple diameters, optional keyway, and through-hole

name: shell
description: Hollow out a solid box leaving open faces — negative thickness shells inward

name: revolve
description: Revolve a 2D profile around an axis to create a solid of revolution (vase, bottle, shaft, ring)

name: text_on_face
description: Emboss or deboss text on a flat face of a box

name: dxf_import
description: Import a 2D DXF file and extrude it into a 3D solid

name: thread
description: Create an ISO metric threaded rod (external) or threaded insert (internal) using cq_warehouse

name: sweep
description: Sweep a circular or rectangular profile along a 3D spline path to create a pipe, tube, or curved rod

name: gear
description: Generate an involute spur gear with correct tooth profile, configurable module, teeth count, and bore

name: generic
description: General CadQuery code generation for shapes not covered by specific skills
